case_title: TARKINGTON, O'CONNOR & O'NELL VS MR. VALERA ANTHONY

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SONOMA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $479.58 AS TO DEFENDANT MR. VALERA ANTHONY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARKINGTON, O'CONNOR & O'NELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MR. VALERA ANTHONY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $63.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,063.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-10-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
